# Inertia and constant motion

## Short Teaching Summary
An object stays at rest or in uniform motion in a straight line unless acted upon by an external net force.

## Difficulty
0.13

## Prerequisites
- Push or pull action
- Balanced forces keep motion
- Object resists changes in motion

## Related Concepts
- Push or pull action (requires)
- Balanced forces keep motion (requires)
- Object resists changes in motion (requires)

## Misconceptions
- None recorded.

## Best Examples
- None recorded.

## Best Analogy
- None recorded.
